stemHtml: The correct order when requesting a radio check is...

options.a: Aeronautical station identification, aircraft identification, "radio check", frequency in use.
options.b: Press the IDENT button, Aircraft identification, Aeronautical station identification, "radio check".
options.c: Aircraft identification, Aeronautical station identification, frequency in use, "radio check".
options.d: Press the IDENT button, Aeronautical station identification, frequency in use, aircraft identification, "radio check".
